ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "suburb" TEXT /* Suburb where the property is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the property */,
  "price" REAL /* Listing price of the property */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the property was listed */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., House, Apartment) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the property listing */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent responsible for the property */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., for sale, sold, withdrawn) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the feature belongs to */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "parking_spaces" INTEGER /* Number of parking spaces available */,
  "land_size" REAL /* Size of the land in square meters */,
  "land_size_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for land size (e.g., m2) */,
  "floor_area" REAL /* Floor area of the property */,
  "floor_area_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for floor area (e.g., m2) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "renovation_year" INTEGER /* Year the property was last renovated */,
  "garden" INTEGER /* Presence of a garden (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "pool" INTEGER /* Presence of a pool (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "garage_type" TEXT /* Type of garage (e.g., attached, detached) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_features_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the amenity belongs to */,
  "heating" INTEGER /* Presence of heating (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "air_con" INTEGER /* Presence of air conditioning (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "internal_laundry" INTEGER /* Presence of internal laundry (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "built_in_wardrobes" INTEGER /* Presence of built-in wardrobes (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "secure_parking" INTEGER /* Presence of secure parking (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "study" INTEGER /* Presence of a study (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "dishwasher" INTEGER /* Presence of a dishwasher (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "gym" INTEGER /* Presence of a gym (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "jacuzzi" INTEGER /* Presence of a jacuzzi (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "outdoor_entertainment" INTEGER /* Presence of outdoor entertainment facilities (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "high_speed_internet" INTEGER /* Presence of high-speed internet (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_history" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the sale belongs to */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price of the sale */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who facilitated the sale */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "buyer_email" TEXT /* Email of the buyer */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., private treaty, auction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_history_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_history_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "office_address" TEXT /* Address of the agent's office */,
  "office_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent's office */,
  "office_email" TEXT /* Email of the agent's office */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, agent, client) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, save) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the property */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the image was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., floor plan, brochure) */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL of the document */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the document was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_documents_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (client) the preference belongs to */,
  "preference_key" TEXT /* Key of the preference (e.g., preferred_location, budget) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
